summary: After defeating the ferocious Drake Caruso, the protagonist earns a special title and receives a new quest to conquer Mount Cruz to gain access to the Eastern Continent. Following a confrontation with the aggressive Zenis Guild, the protagonist hosts a livestream to announce his professional gaming debut and his decision to join the 'New Continent' guild. The chapter concludes with a reveal that his brother, Seok Jeong, is a member of the guild, as he prepares to tackle the main scenario content.
key_moments: Defeat of the Drake Caruso and earning the Drake Hunter title.
Confrontation with the arrogant Zenis Guild members.
Livestream announcement regarding his pro-gamer debut and guild affiliation.
